edge_hypothesis: Every single ACCEPT (23/23) uses ONE signal source — Supertrend OR MACD OR RSI. No strategy has ever required two independent signals to agree. This spec tests a fundamentally different approach: DUAL CONFIRMATION. MACD histogram crossing zero (momentum shift) must coincide with Supertrend already being in the same direction (trend alignment). The logic: MACD zero-cross is our 2nd best signal source (9 ACCEPTs, PF up to 1.712). Supertrend direction is our champion (7 ACCEPTs, PF up to 1.921). Requiring both to agree simultaneously should produce HIGHER CONVICTION entries at the cost of fewer trades. The MACD cross provides timing (momentum just shifted), while the Supertrend direction provides context (the broader trend agrees). An ADX > 15 floor ensures minimum directional conviction. At 8:1 R:R, even a modest win-rate improvement from dual confirmation could push PF significantly above single-signal strategies. Trade count risk: requiring two conditions on the same bar may produce < 30 trades. This is the key invalidation condition. Uses the spec_rules interpreter with machine-parseable conditions.

variants.name: dual_momentum_confluence_eth_8to1
variants.description: MACD histogram crossing above zero + Supertrend already bullish + ADX > 15. Dual confirmation on ETH/4h with 8:1 R:R. The MACD cross provides entry timing, Supertrend direction provides trend context. Both are non-repainting, bar-close executable. 2.0x ATR stop, 16.0x ATR TP.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (16.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if total_trades < 30, dual confirmation is too restrictive for 4h — try relaxing ADX threshold or switching to 1h
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 16.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction — trend context filter, must agree with MACD
MACDh_12_26_9 zero-cross — entry timing signal, fires when momentum shifts
ATR_14 for 2.0x stop / 16.0x TP — 8:1 R:R, plus ADX_14 > 15 minimum conviction gate

variants.name: dual_momentum_confluence_eth_10to1
variants.description: Same dual confirmation (MACD cross + Supertrend direction + ADX > 15) but with 10:1 R:R. 2.0x ATR stop, 20.0x ATR TP. Higher payoff per winning trade. If dual confirmation produces higher win rates than single signals, the extreme R:R should amplify PF dramatically. This is the aggressive variant.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (20.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if PF < dual_8to1 variant, the extra distance doesn't help — 8:1 is the sweet spot for dual confluence
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 20.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction — same trend context as 8:1 variant
MACDh_12_26_9 zero-cross — same timing signal as 8:1 variant
ATR_14 for 2.0x stop / 20.0x TP — 10:1 R:R extreme tail harvesting on dual-confirmed entries
